title: 18s rRNA sequence
author: Dianna Gellar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Our eukaryotic 18S rRNA sequence determines the specific 18S ribosomal RNA (rRNA) genes of eukaryotes and yeast using the next-generation sequencing (NGS) and long-read sequencing platforms. This service helps reveal the microbial community structure, the evolutionary relationship of eukaryotes, and the correlation between eukaryotes and the environment.
